title: baeothryon pumilum
intro: Baeothryon pumilum, also known as dwarf sandwort, is a low-growing, perennial plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its saponin and alkaloid content. The health benefits of Baeothryon pumilum include its potential to soothe skin irritations and wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Baeothryon pumilum can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
